title: Sales & Marketing Executive (Education)
description:
Job Summary
Drive enrollment growth for full-time and part-time academic programs by engaging prospective students and parents through strategic promotion and exceptional service. Manage enrollment administration and create compelling social media content to enhance the institution’s visibility and student engagement.

Responsibilities:

  • Drive course enrollment for full-time and part-time academic programs
  • Promote the institution’s offerings to prospective students and parents.
  • Provide excellent customer service throughout the enrollment process and address inquiries promptly.
  • Manage administrative tasks related to student enrollment, including visa application processing and documentation verification.
  • Work towards achieving individual and team enrollment KPI.
  • Content creation on social media platforms (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube), featuring school life, student experiences, and behind-the-scenes content.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business or Marketing
  • Minimum 1 year of sales experience
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Strong interest in social media, content creation, and storytelling
  • Excellent communication skills in English and Mandarin

Other information:
Salary Structure: Basic pay + Commission + KPI bonus
Working Hours: Monday to Friday, with alternate Saturdays.

postedCompany.description:
Spring College International (SCI) was established in 2001. We are registered with Singapore’s Committee for Private Education (CPE) and awarded with 4-years Edutrust Certificate. We have two campuses with the main campus located at Jurong East and branch campus at Bishan.


SCI provides a full range of education courses and services to suit all the individuals’ needs, which include Language Courses, Preparatory Course, Diploma & Advanced Diploma courses, Holiday Courses, Corporate Language Training, Tuition and Enrichment courses, Education services, Overseas Internship and International Exchanges services. Our self-study trip is one of the popular programmes which is highly recommended among international students. Students can enjoy a special vacation in Singapore, broaden their view and strengthen intercultural exchanges at the same time.


Apart from providing full-time courses for the international students, we also provide part-time courses for local students such as communication and professional language courses as well as customized training programs for companies to meet the ever-growing needs of our customers.


Here at SCI, we adopt an interactive and group-style teaching approach incorporated with multimedia teaching aids to capture students’ interest. SCI uses an advanced learning management system where students and parents can monitor their learning progress anytime, anywhere.


We believe in providing a holistic education and are concerned about our students’ growth by instilling the right values to them. We organize extra curriculum activities such as environmental protection and care for the elderly events for our students annually.
postedCompany.name: SPRING COLLEGE INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.
